# Data Source (hush_mongodb_atlas_access_credential)

Use this data source to retrieve information about a MongoDB Atlas access credential in the Hush Security platform.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "hush_mongodb_atlas_access_credential" "example" {
  id = "acr-eu12345678"
}

output "name" {
  value = data.hush_mongodb_atlas_access_credential.example.name
}

output "host" {
  value = data.hush_mongodb_atlas_access_credential.example.host
}

output "group_id" {
  value = data.hush_mongodb_atlas_access_credential.example.group_id
}

output "db_name" {
  value = data.hush_mongodb_atlas_access_credential.example.db_name
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the MongoDB Atlas access credential

### Read-Only

- `client_id` (String) The MongoDB Atlas service account client ID (used together with `client_secret`)
- `db_name` (String) The name of the MongoDB Atlas database
- `deployment_ids` (List of String) List of deployment IDs that can access this credential. Currently limited to a single deployment
- `description` (String) The description of the MongoDB Atlas access credential
- `group_id` (String) The MongoDB Atlas project (group) ID
- `host` (String) The hostname of the MongoDB Atlas cluster
- `kind` (String) The kind of access credential
- `name` (String) The name of the MongoDB Atlas access credential
- `public_key` (String) The MongoDB Atlas API public key (used together with `private_key`)
- `type` (String) The type of access credential
